task_completion.description: Add a Recognition node to the 'vision_sensor' Camera
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or text editor, a 'Recognition' node is added as a child/field under the 'vision_sensor' Camera node (which is under WAREHOUSE_ROBOT).

task_completion.description: Enable segmentation and set maxRange to 15.0
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties of the newly added Recognition node show 'segmentation' set to TRUE and 'maxRange' set to 15.0.
In the Webots scene tree or text editor, the 'recognitionColors' field for the 'HAZMAT_BARREL' Solid node is set to [ 1 0 0 ] (Red).
In the Webots scene tree or text editor, the 'recognitionColors' field for the 'SHIPPING_CRATE' Solid node is set to [ 0 0 1 ] (Blue).

task_completion.description: Save the configured world to the correct Desktop path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As' dialog in Webots, a text editor save action, or a file manager window showing the file 'semantic_dataset_configured.wbt' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Desktop/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with Webots or a text editor to modify the world file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots GUI scene tree being manipulated or a text editor (like nano, vim, or VS Code) open with the .wbt file, rather than just echoing text into a file blindly.

integrity.description: Agent manually configured the nodes rather than running a pre-made script
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing the values or clicking through the Webots UI to set the colors and recognition parameters, not just executing a python/bash script that does the work.

integrity.description: The file was genuinely saved to the Desktop
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of the save process (e.g., Webots 'Save As' dialog pointing to Desktop, or terminal 'ls' command showing the file exists on the Desktop).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/semantic_dataset_configured.wbt'. The target maxRange for the Recognition node is 15.0. The target recognitionColors for the HAZMAT_BARREL Solid node is [1.0, 0.0, 0.0] (Red). The target recognitionColors for the SHIPPING_CRATE Solid node is [0.0, 0.0, 1.0] (Blue).
